issue_title: Discord - Locally stored users profile pictures not working
issue_body_preview: If export by DCE was done with media from channels being stored locally (`--media true`), you wouldn't be able to see users profile picture as report being generated with [validation of URL](https://github.com/mlomb/chat-analytics/blob/055c68c78e12c6e3f32cb9137135e426c49a64bf/pipeline/parse/parsers/
test_description_zh: 使用 Discord Chat Exporter (DCE) 导出包含本地存储媒体（--media true）的聊天数据，生成分析报告后，检查用户头像是否正常显示。特别关注当用户头像路径为本地相对路径（而非完整 URL）时的显示情况。
expected_result_zh: 当导出数据中用户头像为本地存储路径时，报告中应能正常解析并显示用户的个人头像图片，而不是显示为空白、缺失或默认占位头像。
